subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Feb. 1920
subcodes.first_line: During this period, I was stricken with fever and could not attain unto your gathering; thus was I deprived of meeting with you all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این مدت من تب داشتم و نتوانستم در محفل شما حضور پیدا کنم لذا از ملاقات شما ها محروم بودم
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @goodly deeds; actions
